RE: Potential Conflict of Interest
Item before the Fresno City Planning Commission
As you recall, I contacted your office on March 5, I99I to seek
your advise as to a potential conflict of interest issue. As
explained, I am the legaI advisor for the Fresno City Planning
Commission. The commission was holding a meeting on March 6, 1990
to consider the approval of a conditional use permit for a water
well located approximately I500 feet from my personal residence.
Although I will- be servicecl clirectly from the new welI, it was
questionable whether or not I would receive substantially improved
services.
You had referencecl FPPC Regulation 18702.3(2) and 18702.3(3) ancl
concluded that no conflict of interest was present. In the
unlikely event that my participation in the Planning Commission
meeting and respective Conditional Use Permit were ever called
into question, yourve kindly agreed to draft a letter to formalize
your verbal response to my inquiry.
Thank you for aII your help in this matter.
Deputy City Attorney
